home.intro: I ship products where 95% of the code is AI-generated — orchestrating agents, designing secure systems, and pushing what's possible with agentic workflows.
home.headline: AI-native engineer turning business problems into software with agentic code

about.introParagraph1: I work at the frontier of AI-assisted development — designing agentic workflows, crafting Claude Code skills, and shipping products where 95% of the code is generated by AI. I don't just use AI tools; I build them, extend them, and push their limits daily.
about.introParagraph2: Over six years of professional experience across startups (as CTO, founder, and consultant) taught me one thing: the size of a company doesn't define the depth of the work. I've architected backend systems, built real-time platforms, designed frameworks used by other developers, and led teams — always with a bias toward experimentation and shipping.
about.introParagraph3: Today my focus is sharp: agentic code, security, and compliance. I build systems that are fast to create, safe to deploy, and ready for production.
about.introParagraph4: People who work with me know: I experiment constantly, I learn fast, and I deliver. The experiences may look unconventional on paper — but each one was a deep dive, not a surface skim.
about.introParagraph5: Outside of code: music (prog, jazz, Italian classics), minimal aesthetics, and cross-disciplinary learning.
about.workSubtitle: AI-driven products, startup leadership, and hands-on engineering

spods.title: CTO — Spods
spods.description: Leading the technical vision behind <spodsLink>Spods</spodsLink>, an AI-powered talent acquisition platform built for employment agencies. Designing the architecture for intelligent candidate matching, automated screening workflows, and scalable hiring pipelines — with a strong focus on compliance and data security.

consultant.title: AI Consultant — Independent
consultant.description: Advising companies on agentic workflows, security, and compliance for AI-driven development.
consultant.agenticDescription: Designing and shipping systems where 95% of code is AI-generated. Creating custom Claude Code skills, orchestrating multi-agent pipelines, and building MCP integrations. Deep focus on making AI-assisted development secure, auditable, and production-ready.
consultant.securityDescription: Embedding security-first principles into AI-driven codebases. Ensuring generated code meets compliance standards, implementing guardrails, and designing review workflows that catch what humans miss.
consultant.openSourceDescription: Built <marketplaceLink>tool1-marketplace</marketplaceLink>, a Claude Code plugin marketplace to build, publish, and install plugins that automate development workflows. Created <templateLink>claude-code-marketplace-template</templateLink>, a template for spinning up your own Claude Code plugin marketplace.

freelance.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
freelance.description: Supporting startups and companies in building modern, scalable digital products — from backend architecture to frontend delivery.
freelance.aiDescription: LLM workflows (GPT, LLaMA, Mistral) for information extraction, text generation, and prompt engineering. Semantic search with multilingual embeddings. OCR pipelines with LLM-based normalization. Voice-based automation integrating Speech-to-Text with Telegram. Real-time analytics with Redis and event sourcing.

bubblepod.title: Founder & CTO — BubblePod S.r.l.
bubblepod.description: Social network built around collaborative audio, later evolving into a real-time 1-to-1 video platform. Designed an event-sourcing backend, integrated WebSockets with Soketi, built the Flutter app with battery optimization, and implemented HLS adaptive bitrate streaming for short-form video.

marlon.title: CTO — Marlon
marlon.subtitle: University Project
marlon.description: Collaborative ecosystem for frontend development — a hybrid visual editor and intelligent code generator. Built a Figma-style editor with a plugin system and custom WebGL engine at 60 FPS. Integrated TensorFlow WebAssembly for hand-drawn element recognition, and early NLP workflows (pre-GPT, using NLTK) for generating frontend code from natural language.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.subtitle: Pre-AI era
openSource.description: Built <velvetLink>Velvet</velvetLink>, a modular Flutter framework that reduced delivery time by 40% and cut bugs by 50%. Created <pfyLink>pfy</pfyLink>, a command-sharing terminal tool for developer collaboration. All hand-written, before the AI explosion.

donkey.title: Full-Stack Developer → CTO — DonkeyCommerce S.r.l.
donkey.subtitle: First professional experience
donkey.description: Milan-based e-commerce startup. Started as a full-stack developer, promoted to CTO within months. Rebuilt the entire API and CMS architecture, led a team of four, and improved performance and reliability across the stack.

about.educationSubtitle: From classical studies to computer science, design, and coding

ied.title: Media Design — IED Milano
ied.subtitle: Istituto Europeo di Design
ied.description: Won a full scholarship at a hackathon. IED offered a multidisciplinary environment where technical, creative, and conceptual skills meet. Key courses that shaped my approach:
ied.cinemaDescription: understanding how hardware, narrative, light, and sound shape communication
ied.emotionalDescription: leadership, collaboration, and managing creative-technical teams
ied.designDescription: structured innovation, including Google Design Sprint methodology
ied.interactiveDescription: video, audio, and coding at the intersection; first time leading a hybrid team

unimi.title: Computer Science — UNIMI
unimi.subtitle: University of Milan
unimi.description: Strengthened logical-mathematical foundations and got a structured introduction to formal software development.

classicalStudies.title: Classical Studies — Liceo Classico T. Fazello
classicalStudies.subtitle: High School Diploma
classicalStudies.description1: Latin literature, ancient Greek, philosophy, and the analytical discipline of a classical education. That background shaped my thinking: structured, curious, rigorous.
classicalStudies.description2: Also attended an intensive memory and learning course — advanced techniques for memory organization and reading efficiency that later influenced how I learn, design, and code.

selfTaught.title: Self-Taught Coding
selfTaught.subtitle: Autodidact journey
selfTaught.description: Started from game cracking and hacking blogs — not for their "underground" nature but because they revealed how software really works under the surface. From there, learned systematically through W3Schools, YouTube, and Udemy.

contacts.qrAlt: QR code containing Daniele Tulone's contact information

metadata.homeDescription: AI-native engineer turning business problems into software with agentic code. Specializing in agentic AI, Claude Code, security & compliance.
metadata.aboutDescription: Daniele Tulone — AI-native engineer with 6+ years building agentic workflows, AI-powered products, and secure systems. CTO, consultant, open-source contributor.
metadata.contactsDescription: Get in touch with Daniele Tulone — AI consultant, CTO, and agentic code specialist. Available on LinkedIn, GitHub, or via direct contact.
